metadata.description: Tech product to ticker mappings and supply chain relationships for algorithmic trading
metadata.update_frequency: quarterly for products, event-driven for supply chain
metadata.notes: v1.2 adds: EDA sector (SNPS, CDNS), IP cores (RMBS), advanced packaging materials (GLW, AJINY, PCRFY, IBID), ticker normalization with us_adr fields for non-US stocks
changelog: Added semiconductor_software section (EDA tools, IP cores)
Added emerging_materials section (glass substrates, packaging resins)
Added us_adr field for all non-US tickers (Samsung, Nintendo, MediaTek, etc.)
Added trading_venue field to clarify tradability on US exchanges
Enhanced supply chain with materials companies

ticker_normalization.description: Maps non-US tickers to their US-tradeable equivalents (ADRs or OTC). Use us_adr for Alpaca/US brokers.

IBID.name: Ibiden
IBID.note: Track only - not tradeable on US

eda_tools.description: Electronic Design Automation - the 'toll booth' of chip design. Every new chip requires these tools.

Synopsys.moat: Duopoly with Cadence, 70%+ market share together
Synopsys.signal_correlation: High with R&D budgets, NOT capex
Synopsys.note: Every NVIDIA/AMD/Apple chip uses Synopsys or Cadence tools

Cadence.note: Palladium is critical for chip emulation/verification

Siemens EDA.moat: Calibre is industry standard for DRC/LVS verification
Siemens EDA.note: Siemens EDA is part of Siemens AG - exposure diluted by industrial business

ip_cores.description: Reusable chip design blocks - royalties on every chip shipped

Arm Holdings.moat: 99%+ smartphone market share, growing in servers/AI
Arm Holdings.signal: Every ARM-based chip design generates recurring royalties

Rambus.moat: Critical patents on memory interfaces, especially HBM
Rambus.note: High-margin pure play on HBM explosion for AI

CEVA.note: Smaller player but pure-play IP licensing

SKHIY.note: Primary HBM supplier, sold out through 2026

MU.note: Now #2 in HBM, surpassed Samsung in Q2 2025

tier1_customers.note: Direct consumer sales; enterprise through carriers

SKHIY.name: SK Hynix
SKHIY.note: 57-62% HBM market share (Q3 2025), sold out through 2026, primary NVIDIA supplier

tier1_suppliers.note: Primarily software/IP - minimal physical supply chain
Primarily software/IP - minimal physical supply chain

AEHR.name: Aehr Test Systems
AEHR.signal: EV/SiC demand, AI chip quality requirements

CCMP.name: CMC Materials (now part of Entegris)
CCMP.note: CMP slurries business now under ENTG

emerging_materials.description: Next-generation materials for advanced packaging - potential multi-year hype cycles

GLW.name: Corning Incorporated
GLW.signal: Intel packaging announcements, Apple supply chain news
GLW.note: Glass substrates enable 10x wiring density vs organic - critical for next-gen AI chips

AJINY.name: Ajinomoto Co Inc
AJINY.moat: Near-monopoly in ABF, essential for 99% of high-end CPUs/GPUs
AJINY.risk: Part of larger food company - exposure diluted
AJINY.signal: CPU/GPU shipment growth, advanced packaging demand
AJINY.note: Every H100, M-series, EPYC chip uses ABF substrates

PCRFY.name: Resonac Holdings (formerly Showa Denko)
PCRFY.note: Critical bottleneck supplier for HBM - every HBM stack uses Resonac materials

IBID.name: Ibiden Co Ltd
IBID.note: Track only - very thin US liquidity via OTC

earnings_cascade.description: When major tech reports earnings, suppliers often move with 1-3 day lag

capacity_announcements.description: Fab expansion news flows to equipment/materials suppliers

product_launches.description: New product announcements signal demand for suppliers

eda_signals.description: EDA companies are leading indicators of chip design activity
